title: StageReport
description: Payload for message_type=StageReport. Sent by Overseer to any role to communicate stage progress. Also sent by build/verify agents back to Overseer. If a stage is marked 'completed' but artifacts_expected is not a subset of artifacts_present, Overseer MUST self-NACK and block progression.

stage.description: The lifecycle stage this report covers.

status.description: 'blocked' halts progression until a corrected message arrives.

artifacts_expected.description: Artifact names/paths that must exist for this stage to be 'completed'. Overseer enforces this list.

artifacts_present.description: Artifacts confirmed present at the time of this report. Overseer compares against artifacts_expected.

errors.description: Error messages from this stage, if any. May be empty ([]) on success.

next_expected_message_type.description: What message Overseer expects to receive next. 'none' = run is terminal.

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds this stage has been running, if known.
